channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Netherlands is the first European country to approve Tesla’s supervised Full Self-Driving
item.description: Dutch regulators, the RDW, announced that after over a year and a half of testing, it has officially approved Tesla's Full-Self Driving (FSD) Supervised. This makes the Netherlands the first European country to authorize the use of FSD on its roads. This could open the door to wider adoption throughout the EU. Tesla's European headquarters […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, April 12 (game #1539)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, April 12 (game #770)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, April 12 (game #1036)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: UFC 327 live stream: how to watch Procházka vs Ulberg, start time, preview, full card
item.description: The UFC Light Heavyweight Championship is on the line in Miami, Florida – follow our guide to live stream UFC 327 online Procházka vs Ulberg from anywhere.
